## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what this PR changes and why. -->

## Pillar / method affected

<!-- e.g. recover / ReStaTrainer, harden / SafeGradTrainer, docs, packaging -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] Faithfulness correction (method now matches its cited paper)
- [ ] New method / benchmark
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Audit badge change (if applicable)

<!-- If this changes a method's faithfulness verdict in docs/trust/feature-map.md,
state the old → new badge and link the fixlog / evidence. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the repo style (black, isort, line-length 100)
- [ ] Tests added / updated for the change
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `docs/trust/feature-map.md` updated if a badge changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets / credentials committed

## Reproducible evidence (for faithfulness corrections)

<!-- For a faithfulness change: cite the paper's equation / algorithm step,
show the old code's divergence, and show the new code matches. -->
